heading: Effect on other laws
label: 1014 Effect on other laws
text: Nothing contained in this chapter shall be construed to affect in any manner the application to the business of insurance of the Act of , as amended, known as the National Labor Relations Act [ et seq.], or the Act of , as amended, known as the Fair Labor Standards Act of 1938 [ et seq.], or the Act of , known as the Merchant Marine Act, 1920.July 5, 1935June 25, 1938June 5, 192029 U.S.C. 15129 U.S.C. 201
notes: References in TextAct of , as amended, known as the National Labor Relations Act, referred to in text, is , , which is classified generally to subchapter II (§ 151 et seq.) of chapter 7 of Title 29, Labor. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.July 5, 1935act July 5, 1935, ch. 37249 Stat. 449section 167 of Title 29Act of , as amended, known as the Fair Labor Standards Act, referred to in text, is classified generally to chapter 8 (§ 201 et seq.) of Title 29. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.June 25, 1938section 201 of Title 29Act of , known as the Merchant Marine Act, 1920, referred to in text, is ch. 250, , which was classified principally to chapter 24 (§ 861 et seq.) of former Title 46, Shipping, which became chapter 24 of the former Appendix to Title 46. The Act was substantially repealed and the provisions thereof restated in Title 46, Shipping, by , , , and , , . Section 29 of the Act was transferred and is now classified to , Commerce and Trade. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables. For disposition of sections of former Title 46 and of the former Appendix to Title 46, see Disposition Table preceding .June 5, 1920Aug. 26, 1983Oct. 6, 200641 Stat. 988Pub. L. 98–8997 Stat. 500Pub.
